notes: PR #15 (JsonPointerRepository) merged by ryan-bennett 2026-04-27. New PRs created this run: fix-updateitem-empty-remove (empty remove[] caused invalid DynamoDB expression) and perf-getitems-limit-early-termination (limit wasn't enforced in pagination). Both branch off old main SHA before PR #15 — may need rebase. Do NOT re-propose: cosmetic Object.assign/{} (PR #2 declined). Issues #10 and #12/#13: CI caching and Dependabot config PRs blocked by GitHub Actions .github/ permission. Issue #1: auth-failure, expires May 1. PR #14 open: BEGINS_WITH/CONTAINS operators. All deps up to date as of 2026-04-26.
